sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54695" key="katacustikw=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-ξυστικῶς</orth>, <sense id="n54695.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ξεστικῶς</ref> </xr> (q. v.).</sense> </entryFree>
